name: cart_page_4_cart

facts.note: The direct cart-page crawl captured an empty-cart state with a "Start Shopping" CTA.
"WANT MORE?" is visible, but no actual recommendation products are rendered in the sampled empty-cart view.
The cart states the $75 free-shipping threshold, but no progress bar is visible.
The cart highlights free shipping, free swaps, and formulation reassurance.
No accelerated wallet checkout controls are visible in the sampled cart page.

observed_strengths.observation: The cart communicates clear benefit statements even in the empty-cart state.

missing_or_weak.observation: The cart shows a cross-sell section heading but not actual recommendation content in the sampled state.

purchase_path_notes: This artifact is an empty-cart view; use the journey cart artifact for populated-cart claims.
